hero.headline: Local services, quoted in minutes
hero.sub: Post a job, get competitive quotes from verified Calgary businesses, and book with confidence.

home.step1Desc: Describe what you need, set a budget, and pick your area. Takes under two minutes.
home.step2Desc: Verified local businesses send you competitive quotes. Compare ratings, reviews, and prices.
home.step3Desc: Accept the best quote. Payment is held in escrow and released on completion.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Calgary homeowners getting things done smarter.
